name: policy baseline
description: Policy agent evals pin the LLM-owned behaviors only: which tools get called, argument transcription (total_fare from the FareQuote in conversation history, dates/class from {intake_output} state), and faithful explanation of the tools' three-way verdicts. Deterministic threshold math and verdict boundaries are owned by tests/test_policy.py unit tests, not re-tested here. The user message stands in for the pipeline's conversation history: it carries the fare engine's FareQuote JSON (real fare.Calculate output for each trip, generated 2026-07-07) or, in the degraded case, the A2A failure. Graded on exact tool trajectory; reference responses embed run-date-dependent days-in-advance numbers, so response_match is lenient by design.
